title: selaginella vogelii
intro: Selaginella vogelii, also known as African spikenard or African maidenhair fern, is a species of plant in the Selaginella genus, which is a type of evergreen, perennial flowering plant often confused with ferns due to its frond-like appearance. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which can help to reduce swelling and fight off infections. The health benefits of Selaginella vogelii include its ability to improve respiratory health, reduce fever, and alleviate symptoms associated with digestive issues. The plant can be prepared as a tea, capsule, or tincture for its medicinal benefits, although it's essential to consult with a healthcare professional before using any herbal remedies.
